key_facts: Kwame Osei-Danquah is the head archivist of the Volta Basin Trust.
Kwame Osei-Danquah joined the Volta Basin Trust in 2016.
Kwame Osei-Danquah spent twelve years cataloguing colonial-era survey maps at the National Records Office.
Kwame Osei-Danquah studied history at the University of Ghana.
Kwame Osei-Danquah has published two reference guides on watershed cartography.
Kwame Osei-Danquah is based in Tamale.
